title: Iron Ladies Roar!
original_title: สตรีเหล็ก ตบโลกแตก
overview: The fun-loving Iron Ladies are back, returning to the court for one last shot at being the country's best in a national volleyball championship. They're here to play, in more ways than one but never underestimate the power of these ladies.
